description: Eval cases for pbi-dataflows skill — positive triggers (should use skill) and negative triggers (should NOT use skill)

test_cases.name: Query folding optimization
test_cases.input: My Power Query M query is very slow. I'm adding a custom column before filtering rows. Is this a problem?
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must identify filter-after-transform as folding anti-pattern. Must recommend moving filter steps before custom column.

test_cases.name: Dataflows Gen1 vs Gen2 comparison
test_cases.input: What is the difference between Power BI Dataflows Gen1 and Fabric Dataflows Gen2? When should I use each?
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must cover key differences: platform (PBI Service vs Fabric), output destinations, mashup engine version, Git integration.

test_cases.name: Gateway timeout on large dataflow
test_cases.input: Our on-premises dataflow refresh fails after 2 hours with a gateway timeout. The table has 80M rows. How do I fix this?
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must recommend incremental refresh with RangeStart/RangeEnd as primary fix. May also suggest Lakehouse staging + pipeline for initial load.

test_cases.name: Trigger Fabric dataflow refresh via PowerShell
test_cases.input: How do I trigger a Fabric Dataflow Gen2 refresh programmatically using PowerShell?
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must provide REST API call pattern. Must include verification note to check endpoint with microsoft-docs.

test_cases.name: mashup.json Git conflict
test_cases.input: I have a merge conflict in mashup.json in my Fabric Dataflow. How do I resolve it?
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must warn against manual editing of mashup.json. Must recommend Fabric portal export/re-import workaround.

test_cases.name: Negative: DAX measure optimization
test_cases.input: How do I optimize this DAX measure for better performance?
test_cases.evaluation_notes: DAX optimization is NOT in scope for pbi-dataflows. Should trigger power-bi-dax-optimization instead.

test_cases.name: Negative: Report visual design
test_cases.input: What chart type should I use to show monthly sales trends?
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Chart/visual selection is NOT in scope for pbi-dataflows. Should trigger power-bi-report-design-consultation.
